transcription.text: New York City's dreamiest date night spots. If you're looking for a taste of sophisticated French elegance, this restaurant has hosted guests like Chris Rock and Taylor Swift. This is the place to save a swanky meal. The name of this restaurant is Bordasserie. Shop my seven-day New York City itinerary in my bio for more.
